About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: Momentum-Ranker Dashboard Today's data shows SLGL dominating the momentum rankings with an exceptional composite score of 97.6, driven primarily by extraordinary long-term returns (1,209.55% over 1 year) and perfect positioning above all major moving averages (SMA30/50/100/200). The ratio consistency metric is exceptionally strong at 98.87, though the 1-week return is surprisingly modest at 0.13%, suggesting this is a sustained multi-month rally rather than a fresh short-term catalyst. EFXT ranks second with a 190.34% 1-year return and strong 3-6 month acceleration, though it carries a -1.53% 1-day pullback that slightly weakens its short-term momentum signal compared to SLGL. Both stocks demonstrate resilience on bad SPY days with scores above 98, indicating they hold strength during broader market downturns rather than being correlated with daily equity market reversals.
